title.en: Why did the Heyuan Holy Beast break through?

content.en:
Not only were the two supreme holy beasts of the Sea and Sky Holy Sect stunned, but the other holy beasts were also confused.

The Heyuan Holy Beast's last few dark calendars have been very low-key, with no sense of existence, and there is almost no sign of a breakthrough, how could it suddenly break through?

You must know that many holy beasts have better talents than Heyuan holy beasts, their cultivation speed is faster, and they have reached the extreme of top holy beasts early, and they have even entered the dark forbidden realm twice, and they still haven't broken through.

Why did the Heyuan Holy Beast break through?

Suddenly, some of the top holy beasts were jealous.

Of course, many disciples of the Haitian Holy Sect and some holy beasts were still very excited, after all, the Haitian Holy Sect had one more supreme holy beast, which meant that the strength of the Haitian Holy Sect was stronger, and their lives would naturally be much better.

Moreover, the catastrophe is coming, and the stronger the Haitian Holy Sect is, the more they have hope of saving their lives.

After all, the Great Tribulation was very terrifying, and it was also a big challenge for the Haitian Holy Sect.

"Make sure the safety of the Heyuan Holy Beast and don't let people disturb him!"

The two supreme holy beasts, the wolf bone holy beast, and the violent ape holy beast, ordered.

However, they didn't know at all that this was not their Haitian Holy Sect's Heyuan Holy Beast, it was just Ye Tian's copy body, if they knew, they would definitely kill Ye Tian's copy body at all costs.

With the passage of time, coupled with the refining of a large number of resources, Ye Tian's replicating body continued to transform, and his body became stronger and stronger.

After a long time, Ye Tian's copy of the body of the Heyuan Holy Beast's strongest holy beast was completely transformed.

At this point, this replica body stepped into the realm of the strongest holy beast.

When the Replicating Body Heyuan Holy Beast stepped into the realm of the Supreme Holy Beast, it actually had a faint connection with the main body.

The previous replication body was too weak to connect with the door, so there was no way to connect with the body, and every time you had to pass through the door and enter the forbidden land of the sea and sky, you could contact the body.

But now there is no need to worry.

"The connection is faint, but at least it can be contacted, and it only takes about a few decades to get in touch!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Soon, decades passed, and the replicating body was connected to the body.

At the moment of connection, the ability to copy changed, and strictly speaking, the ability to copy the body changed.

"Can you re-solidify a replica body?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Previously, his replica body, the Aoba Ancestor, did not occupy the quota of the replica body, and was permanently solidified into a special clone.

It's a pity that this doppelganger didn't care about the foundation in order to advance, and it was an ancestor method that fused with others, so its potential was very limited, and now although it has been promoted to the top ancestor level, it is more than a hundred times more difficult to be promoted to the strongest ancestor than others.

Therefore, the potential of this doppelganger is not good, and it is of little use.

After all, in the Dark Forbidden Domain, Ye Tian's body can suppress everything, what is the use of a top ancestor clone in this mere body, it is not as powerful as the incarnation.

"Then give up the clone of the Aoba Ancestor and use the Heyuan Holy Beast as a permanent solidified clone, in that case, my body can vacate the quota of the copy body, use the copy body again and again, and then burn the ancestral soul to comprehend the ultimate ancestor technique and fuse the ultimate ancestor technique, and the cultivation speed will be increased many times!"

Ye Tian planned.

Click!!!

Dark Souls.

The doppelganger of the Aoba Ancestor shattered, and the aura dissipated.

For the first time, the ancestors of the human race sensed it and panicked.

But soon, Ye Tian's message calmed down the ancestor of the human race.

The clone of the Aoba Ancestor dissipated, and the Heyuan Holy Beast of the Sea and Sky Holy Sect in the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth turned into a permanent solidified clone.

At this moment, Ye Tiancai was completely relieved.

"The copy body does not need to be maintained all the time, in the future, it can be used as a consumable to overdraw the potential of the ultimate ancestral technique, with the ability of derivation and the continuous condensation of the copy body, I can definitely comprehend the second supreme ancestral technique in a short period of time. Of course, the premise is to occupy the Haitian Holy Sect first, otherwise there is no way to comprehend the rules in the Holy Land Heaven and Earth with peace of mind. "

Ye Tian muttered.

It didn't take long for the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth Tribulation to be left for only a few decades.

-----------------

Sanctuary Heaven and Earth, Haitian Holy Sect.

Ye Tian's doppelganger, the Heyuan Holy Beast, stayed with the Wolf Bone Holy Beast and the Violent Ape Holy Beast, discussing the time of the Great Tribulation.

At this time, Ye Tian had just come out of the customs, so he didn't know a lot of things.

"The Great Tribulation is coming, and this time our Sanctuary Heaven and Earth will face great trouble. The Storm Ape Sanctuary sighed.

Ye Tian didn't say much, he was not a real Heyuan Holy Beast after all, it would be bad if he said the wrong thing.

Therefore, he only listened, speaking once in a while, saying something less important.

Gradually, Ye Tian understood something about this catastrophe.

The catastrophe faced by the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth is not as terrifying as the Dark Forbidden Domain, the Dark Forbidden Domain is too weak, and the first three tribulations have no resistance at all, and even the top ancestors will hide, not daring to show their heads at all, and let the powerhouses of other foreign realms snatch resources.

And the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth are different, the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth have the strongest holy beast, and there is more than one, and even has a second-level supreme holy beast, which naturally has a certain resistance ability.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian opened his mouth and said: "Wolf Bone Holy Beast, Violent Ape Holy Beast, why don't you destroy those gates of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, it is difficult for the top ancestors to invade those forbidden places, but we Supreme Holy Beasts should have enough strength to destroy their forbidden places and destroy their gates, right?"

The wolf bone holy beast smiled and said: "Heyuan holy beast, you have just broken through to the level of the strongest holy beast, and you don't know much about some things, yes, we do have the strength to destroy a forbidden land, but those forces have already locked the coordinates of the holy realm heaven and earth, and can establish a gate again." The next time they build a door, I'm afraid they will retaliate like crazy. And it's not easy to destroy the door, the door is divided into three levels, the weakest door is only allowed to enter the top holy beasts, and the strongest holy beasts can pass through it at a cost, but it will cause damage to the door, and it will take a lot of resources to repair it. The second-order gate can allow the strongest holy beast to enter, even the invincible holy beast can enter at the cost. The third-order gate is also a legendary gate, comparable to the gate that was born naturally between heaven and earth, the kind of door that can allow invincible holy beasts to enter, and even supreme holy beasts can pass through it at a price. "

"Is the door of our Haitian Holy Sect a first-order gate?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" the wolf bone holy beast nodded, "We don't have a method of building a second-order gate, but the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth has a second-order gate, and the corresponding forces of that second-order gate are terrifying, and the three major holy sects alone can't stop it at all, so our three major holy sects have united with some foreign forces and will not destroy their gates, but at the time of the great tribulation, they need to join forces with us to fight against the forces where the second-order gate is located." That's the ultimate reason why we don't break some doors. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Then, the Wolf Bone Sacred Beast and the Violent Ape Holy Beast revealed another secret, that is, the purpose of those foreign forces to invade other foreign lands.

For a long time, Ye Tian thought that the reason for the invasion of those foreign forces was to attack the level of the Supreme Ancestor, the Supreme Holy Beast, and the Bone Emperor for the sake of resources and the comprehension of the foreign rules, but this was only part of the reason, and the more important reason was to rob the crystal for the origin rules!
